hook_options: No gaps. No wobble. Just the fit the Royal Pop deserves.
The first wrist adapter engineered for the Royal Pop—not the other way around.

beats.line: Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption:
The Royal Pop’s case back isn’t just a design—it’s a challenge. 40.35mm socket. 0.7mm retaining lip. 22mm lug width. Cradle Adapter V1 is the first wrist conversion kit engineered to match these dimensions precisely. No gaps. No wobble. No afterthought. 

FKM rubber. 8 colourways. One engineering standard. 

Join the waitlist to secure yours before the first batch sells out. Comment WRIST and I’ll send the link.

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption:
Precision isn’t accidental. 

40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for the Royal Pop’s exact dimensions—no compromises, no generic fits. 

FKM rubber. 8 colourways. Designed for the wrist, not the other way around. 

Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.

pieces.cta: Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.
pieces.handoff_note_for_qa: Recommended caption A for its stronger narrative flow and explicit proof points (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm). Aligns with the brief’s emphasis on engineering precision and addresses the 'needs colour match' objection with the 8 colourways mention. Both captions avoid affiliation language and hype.
_validation_notes: caption_options[A] first line 254 chars > 125 (above IG fold)
